title: Pulse Codex
summary: Implementato task contract, trace, cleanup gate, work-start, dashboard timeline e self-test per bloccare deriva e pezzi sparsi.
next: Eseguire smoke test e2e ripetuti, poi checkpoint during/after.

intent.title: Core Codex e2e enforcement
intent.request: Implementare controllo end-to-end obbligatorio mentre Codex lavora: task contract, trace, anti-deriva, cleanup e test ripetuti.
